results.title: International Monetary Fund | April 2026 Global Economy Tested Again
10 Charts To Address Concerns On 2026 Geopolitical Conflict
Stock Market Outlook 2026: Political Risks Loom | Morgan Stanley
War Darkens Global Economic Outlook and Reshapes Policy Priorities
2026 Market Outlook | J.P. Morgan Global Research

summary: Middle East conflict has closed Strait of Hormuz, spiking energy prices. IMF forecasts 19% rise in energy commodities and global growth of only 3.1%. Additional flashpoints: US/Venezuela, Iran, NATO/Greenland. Tariff uncertainty and Fed leadership change add to investor navigation complexity.
